title: Why Each Wrong Answer Is Tempting

distractors.whyTempting: CT is the standard imaging for pancreatitis complications and is reflexively ordered
distractors.whyWrong: CT should be reserved for patients not improving at 48-72h, not at initial presentation

distractors.whyTempting: ERCP treats gallstone pancreatitis, and gallstones are the most common cause
distractors.whyWrong: ERCP is only indicated with concurrent cholangitis or persistent biliary obstruction

distractors.whyTempting: Severe pancreatitis requires ICU, and students may overestimate severity
distractors.whyWrong: Transient organ failure (<48h) is moderately severe, not severe — ICU not required

visual_contract.teaching_goal: Expose cognitive errors behind each tempting wrong answer in pancreatitis management
